task_completion.description: Select the correct ANC indicators in the DHIS2 Data Visualizer/Pivot Table app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DHIS2 interface with 'ANC 1st visit' and 'ANC 4th or more visits' selected in the Data dimension.

task_completion.description: Select the correct period (2023 quarters) and organisation units (Sierra Leone districts).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the pivot table configured with quarters for 2023 in the Period dimension and districts in the Organisation Unit dimension.

task_completion.description: Save the pivot table as a favorite with the required name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the pivot table saved with the title 'National ANC Coverage Districts 2023' visible at the top of the table or in the save dialog.

task_completion.description: Export the pivot table data to the Downloads folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DHIS2 download/export menu being used, a browser download completion notification, or a file manager open in /home/ga/Downloads/ showing the exported file.

task_completion.description: Document districts where ANC 4th visit counts are less than half of ANC 1st visit counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor open with the file 'anc_analysis_notes.txt' containing a list of specific districts where the 4th visit count is < 50% of the 1st visit count.

task_completion.description: Provide an overall assessment of national ANC coverage quality.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show qualitative text in 'anc_analysis_notes.txt' discussing or assessing the overall quality of national ANC coverage based on the data.

integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 web GUI to create the pivot table.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation and interaction within the DHIS2 web interface (Data Visualizer app), rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent exported the data using the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser's download mechanism or the DHIS2 export menu, rather than a terminal window creating a mock file in the Downloads directory.

integrity.description: The text file contains genuine analysis rather than copy-pasted prompt instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file contains actual district names and an original assessment paragraph, not just a repetition of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct indicators in DHIS2 are 'ANC 1st visit' and 'ANC 4th or more visits' (not just 'ANC 4th visit'). Sierra Leone has 14 districts. The required favorite name is 'National ANC Coverage Districts 2023'. The analysis file must be saved at '/home/ga/Desktop/anc_analysis_notes.txt'.
